If you do enter your billing information when signing up for Free Trial, you will not be charged by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) until Free Trial has expired. On the last day of Free Trial period, unless you cancelled your Subscription, you will be automatically charged the applicable Subscription fees for the type of Subscription you have selected. At any time and without notice, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to (i) modify Terms of Service of Free Trial offer, or (ii) cancel such Free Trial offer.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: common mistake identify करा;

entries.source: Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: gaps identify करा, clarifying questions विचारा, explanation rebuild करा आणि retry करा.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: सर्वात महत्त्वाची school goals identify करा: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback किंवा enrichment.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: एखादे card सतत fail होत असल्यास फक्त repeat करू नका. ते hard का आहे ते विचारा. misconception uncover करण्यासाठी Socratic Instruction, procedural gaps साठी Math Step Coach किंवा better study prompt शोधण्यासाठी AI learning prompt library वापरा.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: answer yes असेल तर AI ने तुम्हाला study करण्यात मदत केली. answer no असेल तर next move अधिक reading नाही. ती active practice आहे. Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction किंवा AI learning prompt library उघडा आणि topic ला तुम्हाला attempt करावी लागेल अशा task मध्ये बदला.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: learner ची request vague असल्यास reasons, best modes, controversy level आणि evidence quality सह 3 ते 5 people suggest करा. person named असेल पण time slice missing असल्यास in-character dialogue आधी त्या person च्या meaningful versions offer करा. person आणि time slice clear झाल्यावर person बोलण्यापूर्वी room आणि dossier build करा.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: learner चा intent vague असल्यास त्याला 3 concrete arrival options मध्ये resolve करा आणि choice साठी थांबा. passport आधीच clear असल्यास paragraph ऐवजी modular cards ने world open करा.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: response खूप broad वाटल्यास narrow करा. one example, one misconception, one check question किंवा one next step मागा. खूप easy वाटल्यास challenge मागा. खूप hard वाटल्यास तुम्हाला आधीच माहित असलेल्या गोष्टीतून bridge मागा.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: work homework असेल तर Homework Coach मध्ये सुरू करा. math असेल तर Math Step Coach वापरा आणि एकावेळी एक step check करायला सांगा. concept deeply समजून घ्यायचे असल्यास Socratic Instruction वापरा आणि summary मागण्यापूर्वी questions answer करा.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: तुम्ही California resident असल्यास आम्ही तुमच्याबद्दल कोणता data collect करतो ते जाणून घेण्याचा, तुमचा data delete करण्याची आणि तो sell (share) न करण्याची मागणी करण्याचा तुम्हाला अधिकार आहे. data protection rights exercise करण्यासाठी तुम्ही certain requests करू शकता आणि आम्हाला विचारू शकता:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: तुम्ही European Union (EU) आणि European Economic Area (EEA) चे resident असल्यास, GDPR अंतर्गत covered असलेले काही data protection rights तुम्हाला आहेत. तुम्हाला तुमचा Personal Data correct, amend, delete किंवा त्याचा use limit करता यावा म्हणून आम्ही reasonable steps घेण्याचा प्रयत्न करतो. आम्ही तुमच्याबद्दल कोणता Personal Data hold करतो हे जाणून घ्यायचे असल्यास आणि तो आमच्या systems मधून remove करायचा असल्यास, कृपया support@inspir.app वर email करा. तुम्ही European Union (EU) आणि European Economic Area (EEA) चे resident असल्यास, GDPR अंतर्गत covered असलेले काही data protection rights तुम्हाला आहेत. तुमचा Personal Data correct, amend, delete किंवा त्याचा use limit करता यावा म्हणून आम्ही reasonable steps घेण्याचा प्रयत्न करतो. certain circumstances मध्ये तुम्हाला पुढील data protection rights आहेत:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: या Privacy Policy बद्दल काही questions असल्यास, कृपया email द्वारे आमच्याशी contact करा: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: तुम्ही homework question paste करून final answer copy केल्यास task finish होईल, पण skill build झालेले नसेल. तुम्ही hint मागितला, तुमचे thinking explain केले, तुमचे answer compare केले आणि similar problem try केला, तर AI shortcut ऐवजी study partner बनते.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: Service द्वारे उपलब्ध केलेले कोणतेही product किंवा service purchase करायची असल्यास ("Purchase"), तुमच्या Purchase शी relevant certain information supply करण्यास तुम्हाला सांगितले जाऊ शकते, ज्यात तुमचा credit किंवा debit card number, card ची expiration date, billing address आणि shipping information यांचा समावेश होतो पण तेवढेच मर्यादित नाही. तुम्ही represent आणि warrant करता की: (i) कोणत्याही Purchase संदर्भात card(s) किंवा other payment method(s) वापरण्याचा legal right तुम्हाला आहे; आणि (ii) तुम्ही आम्हाला supply केलेली information true, correct आणि complete आहे. payment facilitate करण्यासाठी आणि Purchases complete करण्यासाठी आम्ही third-party services वापरू शकतो. तुमची information submit करून, आमच्या Privacy Policy च्या subject या third parties ना information provide करण्याचा right तुम्ही आम्हाला grant करता. product किंवा service availability, product किंवा service च्या description किंवा price मधील errors, तुमच्या order मधील error किंवा other reasons यांसह पण त्यापुरते मर्यादित नसलेल्या reasons साठी कोणत्याही वेळी तुमचा order refuse किंवा cancel करण्याचा right आम्ही reserve करतो. fraud किंवा unauthorized किंवा illegal transaction suspected असल्यास order refuse किंवा cancel करण्याचा right आम्ही reserve करतो; decision आमचा असेल आणि contest करता येणार नाही.

entries.value: नियोजन, पुनरावृत्ती, रचना आणि फीडबॅकद्वारे तुमचे लेखन सुधारा, ज्यामुळे तुमची स्वतःची शैली कायम राहील.

entries.source: Improve writing without losing your voice
entries.value: तुमचा voice न गमावता writing improve करा

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: AI वेगाने पुढे जात असलेल्या जगात, फक्त मानवी consciousness आणि creativity टिकू शकतील. Albert Einstein एकदा म्हणाले होते, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."

entries.source: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation. For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: लागू national किंवा international law किंवा regulation चे violation करणाऱ्या कोणत्याही प्रकारे. minors ना inappropriate content दाखवून किंवा इतर कोणत्याही प्रकारे exploit, harm किंवा exploit/harm करण्याचा attempt करण्याच्या purpose ने. कोणतेही advertising किंवा promotional material, including कोणतेही “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” किंवा similar solicitation transmit करणे किंवा sending procure करणे. Company, Company employee, another user किंवा कोणत्याही person किंवा entity चे impersonate करणे किंवा attempt करणे. others च्या rights चे infringement करणाऱ्या, किंवा illegal, threatening, fraudulent किंवा harmful असलेल्या, किंवा unlawful, illegal, fraudulent किंवा harmful purpose किंवा activity शी connection असलेल्या कोणत्याही प्रकारे. Service चा use किंवा enjoyment कोणासाठी restrict किंवा inhibit करणाऱ्या, किंवा आमच्या determination नुसार Company किंवा Service users ना harm/offend करू शकणाऱ्या किंवा liability ला expose करू शकणाऱ्या इतर conduct मध्ये engage होणे.

entries.source: In this guide
entries.value: या guide मध्ये

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: question, तुम्ही आधी काय प्रयत्न केले, कुठे अडकलात आणि तुम्हाला hint, step check की feedback हवे आहे हे समाविष्ट करा.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: तुम्हाला काय माहित आहे, काय tried केले, कोणता level हवा आहे आणि कोणत्या प्रकारची help हवी आहे ते include करा.
